case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. YK CONSTRUCTION CO. INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT YK CONSTRUCTION CO. INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT YK CONSTRUCTION CO. INC.
